summary: This document is an official notice issued by a university or student support authority detailing the rules and procedures for scholarships, accommodation, and degree awards for the academic year 2025/26. Its main purpose is to inform students about updated scholarship amounts, eligibility criteria, application deadlines, and accommodation procedures. Key topics covered include scholarship amounts and conditions for full-time and non-resident students, lease update requirements, special provisions for students in certain medical programs, and important dates for applications and degree prizes.

metadata.title: Notice of competition – scholarship accommodation and degree award a.y. 2025/26
